creator: brock@cottonwoodcomputer.com
text: Commenting out the clear stall code did make it work using these usb adapters.  It broke printing to some of the newer epson's that have built-in USB ports, though.  For now we'll just communicate via the /dev/usb device instead of ulpt0.  That said I'm happy to do any further testing if this is something anyone wants to look into further.  I think it must be a fairly widespread issue given that all of the different usb-parallel adapters we could round up exhibited the same issue.
